description_long: This rifle features a blocky, pixelated design reminiscent of video game aesthetics, with a predominantly dark gray and black color scheme. The main body is rectangular, with a long, slender barrel extending from the front and a squared-off stock at the rear. The rifle includes a visible trigger guard and a magazine well, with the magazine itself appearing as a protruding rectangular element beneath the receiver. The handguard and grip are integrated into the angular body, and the barrel is accented by a small, colored detail near the base, possibly representing a safety or attachment point. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A blocky, dark gray and black rifle with a long barrel, rectangular stock, and visible magazine, designed in a pixelated style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the squared-off stock, central receiver, and the symmetrical, blocky structure of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, slender barrel extending forward and the protruding magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the stock and the overall rectangular silhouette of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the barrel's length and the angular, geometric design of the rifle.
